title: Dutch police urge victims of 'international sextortion campaign' to come forward
summary_full: Dutch police have warned that dozens of women and girls were coerced into degrading sexual acts on camera in several countries.
summary_public: Dutch police have warned that dozens of women and girls were coerced into degrading sexual acts on camera in several countries.
